title: How to Get the Best Results Using LTspice for EMC Simulation - Part 1
agent_use: Core reference for generating LTspice LISN testbenches, plotting CM/DM noise and pre-compliance limit lines.
notes: Public web page; use for RAG summaries, not wholesale copying.

title: Using LTspice for EMC and Signal Integrity - Part 2
agent_use: Use for agent workflows around wired interfaces, cable/interconnect effects and SPICE-compatible channel models.

title: A Practical Method for Separating Common-Mode and Differential-Mode Emissions in Conducted Emissions Testing
agent_use: Teach agent to classify noise as CM or DM and select filter topology accordingly.

title: Speed Up the Design of EMI Filters for Switch-Mode Power Supplies
agent_use: Use for filter-design reasoning and explaining why conducted EMI filter iteration is costly.

title: Mitigating EMI for a CISPR 22-Compliant Power Solution
agent_use: Good case material for selecting low-EMI components, filters, layout and shielding as a combined solution.

title: Proper Layout and Component Selection Controls EMI
agent_use: Use for rules about input impedance, inductors and bypassing in switchers; useful caution against brute-force capacitance.

title: Layout Guidelines Maximize Automotive Power-Supply Performance and Minimize Emissions
agent_use: Use for automotive-oriented heuristics: main-supply filters, ferrites/inductors, FM-band emissions.

agent_use: Use later for radiated expansion: board layout, stack-up, stitching capacitance, edge guarding.

title: AN-0971: Recommendations for Control of Radiated Emissions with isoPower Devices
agent_use: Use for PDN/stack-up heuristics around close plane spacing and interplane capacitance.

title: Basic Linear Design, Chapter 12: Printed Circuit Board Design Issues
agent_use: Use for mixed-signal PCB rules, grounding tradeoffs, converter decoupling and layout caveats.

title: Practical Power Solutions, Section 4: Hardware Design Techniques
agent_use: Use for practical parasitic effects: trace resistance, capacitance and power-supply grounding/layout.

subarea: noise mechanisms, mitigation, practical filter workflow
title: AN-2162: Simple Success With Conducted EMI From DC-DC Converters
agent_use: Core source for DC/DC conducted EMI mechanisms, mitigation strategies, and practical filter design workflow. Foundational reference for the filtering agent.
notes: Local PDF (public TI application note). Filename: SRC-071__an2162_simple_success_conducted_emi_dcdc.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/conducted_emissions/dcdc/ti/.

subarea: automotive buck, conducted emission model, validation
title: SNVA886: Reduce Conducted EMI in Automotive Buck Converter Applications
agent_use: Buck-specific conducted EMI: model plus filter design plus layout/shielding mitigation plus measurement validation. Directly relevant to case_001 buck demo.
notes: Local PDF (public TI app note). Filename: SRC-072__snva886_reduce_conducted_emi_automotive_buck.pdf.

subarea: EMI filter for non-isolated DC/DC, discrete + module
title: ANS018: EMI Filter Design for Non-Isolated DC/DC Converter
agent_use: EMI filter design tailored to non-isolated DC/DC. Discrete and module-based variants. Good source for filter-agent rules in M2.9.
notes: Local PDF (public Würth app note). Filename: SRC-073__ans018_emi_filter_design_non_isolated_dcdc.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/conducted_emissions/dcdc/wurth/.

subarea: input filter stability, pi-filter, damping, oscillation
title: SLUA929: Simple Solution for Input Filter Stability Issue in DC/DC Converters
agent_use: Critical for the filter-vs-stability tradeoff. Covers pi input filters, damping techniques, oscillation risk and stability margins. Helps prevent the common failure where adding an EMI filter breaks loop stability.
notes: Local PDF (public TI app note). Filename: SRC-074__slua929_input_filter_stability_dcdc.pdf.

subarea: LC input filter design, resonance, damping, EMC motivation
title: SNVA801: Analysis and Design of Input Filter for DC-DC Circuit
agent_use: Deterministic LC input filter design: resonance frequency, damping factor calculation, EMC-pass motivation. Direct input to the variant engine and filter agent.
notes: Local PDF (public TI app note). Filename: SRC-075__snva801_input_filter_design_dcdc.pdf.

title: Partitioning and Layout of a Mixed Signal PCB
agent_use: Henry Ott's canonical guidance on mixed-signal PCB partitioning and ground/return-path management. Strong source for layout_risk, decoupling and power_integrity agent rules.
notes: Local PDF (public article from the Henry Ott Consultants archive). Filename: SRC-076__ott_partitioning_layout_mixed_signal_pcb.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/henry_ott/. Scanned image-only PDF (no text layer): citable by Source_ID but not in the vector index until OCR'd.

subarea: image plane, ground plane, PCB radiation
title: Effect of an Image Plane on Printed Circuit Board Radiation
agent_use: Quantifies how a close return/image plane cuts PCB radiation. Backs stackup and layout_risk reasoning on plane proximity and loop area.
notes: Local PDF (public article from the Henry Ott Consultants archive). Filename: SRC-077__ott_image_plane_pcb_radiation.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/henry_ott/. Scanned image-only PDF (no text layer): citable by Source_ID but not in the vector index until OCR'd.

subarea: ground as a current path, return-current routing
title: Ground - A Path For Current Flow
agent_use: Foundational treatment of 'ground' as a real current path, not an equipotential. Supports grounding/common-impedance reasoning across agents.
notes: Local PDF (public article from the Henry Ott Consultants archive). Filename: SRC-078__ott_ground_path_for_current_flow.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/henry_ott/. Scanned image-only PDF (no text layer): citable by Source_ID but not in the vector index until OCR'd.

title: Understanding and Controlling Common-Mode Emissions in High-Power Electronics
agent_use: Directly on-domain: common-mode emission mechanisms and control in power electronics. High-value source for the filtering and dcdc agents on CM noise.
notes: Local PDF (public APEC 2002 paper from the Henry Ott Consultants archive). Filename: SRC-079__ott_apec_2002.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/henry_ott/.

title: Understanding and Finding the Invisible Antennas in Your Design
agent_use: How cables, slots and traces become unintentional radiators. Useful background for high_speed and layout_risk agents; radiated focus is adjacent to the conducted-EMI MVP.
notes: Local PDF (public presentation from the Henry Ott Consultants archive). Filename: SRC-080__ott_antennas.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/henry_ott/.

title: EMC Aspects of Future High Speed Digital Designs (PCB Design Conference East keynote)
agent_use: Keynote overview of EMC challenges in high-speed digital design. Broad context for the high_speed and mixed_signal agents.
notes: Local PDF (public keynote from the Henry Ott Consultants archive). Filename: SRC-081__ott_keynote.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/henry_ott/.

subarea: EMC mapping methodology, grounding/shielding in detector electronics
title: EMC: A Mapping for the CMS Experiment
organization: KEK Esys / CERN CMS (F. Arteche, doctoral thesis)
agent_use: Systematic EMC mapping / characterisation methodology for large detector electronics — grounding, shielding, conducted coupling. Methodology source, not a vendor recommendation.
notes: Local PDF (public KEK Esys EMC R&D page). Filename: SRC-082__arteche_emc_mapping_cms_experiment.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/kek/.

subarea: grounding policy, reference scheme for a large system
title: Belle-II Grounding Policy v1
agent_use: A worked grounding policy for a large multi-subsystem instrument — single-point vs multi-point, isolation, reference routing. Concrete grounding-practice source.
notes: Local PDF (public KEK Esys EMC R&D page). Filename: SRC-083__belle_ii_grounding_policy_v1.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/emc_reference/kek/.
